summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MentorMeUp backend APIs and frontend UI. All 19 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend authentication, home page, and coach chat all working correctly with real Claude Sonnet 4.6 integration.
seed_data_creation: Re-seeded test session after logout test deleted it. Session expires 2026-04-26.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All tests pass. Test session token is test_session_1776631129183. The logout test was modified to not delete the main test session. Coach chat returns real Claude Sonnet 4.6 responses that reference user's goals and name.

backend: GET /api/auth/me with valid token - 200 with user data
POST /api/goals - creates goal with 3 phases and 2 daily tasks
POST /api/goals/{goal_id}/tasks/{task_id}/toggle - flips completed flag and recomputes progress
POST /api/coach/chat - returns real Claude Sonnet 4.6 reply within 15s
POST /api/auth/logout - endpoint exists and returns ok
frontend: Login page loads with data-testid elements (login-page, login-title, google-login-button)
Authenticated home page shows MentorMeUp title, goal input, chips, and coach orb
Coach orb click opens drawer with input and send button
Sending message shows user message optimistically and receives Claude reply within 15s
Claude reply references user's name (Alex) and actual goals (half marathon, marathon)
